description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design. The exterior is clad in a reddish-brown material resembling brick or wood paneling, and large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across all sides. The house features a carport on one side, partially sheltered by a flat overhang, and is surrounded by several mature trees and a sandy yard. The interior layout is partially visible, revealing multiple rooms, staircases, and open spaces, with some rooms furnished and others left bare. The main entryway is marked by a covered porch area and a prominent front door, flanked by large windows. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a carport, surrounded by trees and a sandy yard. The reddish-brown exterior and asymmetrical window placement give it a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entryway with a covered porch, and large windows; trees frame the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, asymmetrical window arrangement, and more trees along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows and a clear view of the backyard area, showing the house's depth and open layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the carport from a different angle, additional windows, and the side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat-roofed covered porch, large front door, and flanking windows, no steps or columns.
